heading: INSTRUCTIONAL MATERIALS PARENT PORTAL
operative_text: The State Board of Education shall adopt standards for entities that supply instructional materials reviewed by the agency under Section 31.023 to make instructional materials supplied by the entity available on a parent portal hosted by the entity.
_note: No explicitly defined terms in this section. Operative text captures the core mandate in Subsection (a); remaining subsections specify portal requirements, limitations on standards, access verification, and district compliance.
